Having a great appetite for anything (e.g., a voracious reader).
To smash.
To (cause to) float easily or gently through the air.
Said of the Moon as it passes through the phases of its monthly cycle where its surface is less and less visible.
Deserved, necessary, appropriate.
To sway back and forth; to totter or reel.
Facing towards the flow of a fluid, usually air.
Given to whimsy.
Full of zeal; ardent, fervent; exhibiting enthusiasm or strong passion.
